items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an 'event trail for previews/downloads', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied or any checks related to the event trail. The absence of any relevant evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
